summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that UPS is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $103.67. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 33.3%. The asset has recently tested this support 1 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $108.16. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
